velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Define and monitor data SLAs and SLOs, ensuring that product teams deliver data that meets business needs in terms of timeliness, accuracy, and availability.
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Multiple rigour signals including data quality frameworks, SLAs/SLOs, observability, and proactive data reliability engineering with no velocity language.
domain_risk_quote: fintech ecosystem in payments, dunning, invoicing, and collections
domain_risk_reasoning: FinTech company operating in payments and collections with explicit mention of regulatory reporting indicates financial/regulatory data risk.
collaboration_width_teams: product owners; BI; data analysis; data science; data platform; tech teams; Platform Engineering teams; Business IT teams; Data Governance; Data Architecture
data_team_maturity_quote: Partner with Platform Engineering teams to ensure smooth operation of data pipelines within the shared core data platform.
data_team_maturity_reasoning: The reference to an existing shared core data platform, multiple agile data product teams, and operational pipelines indicates established infrastructure being improved rather than built from zero.
jd_authorship_quote: Define and monitor data SLAs and SLOs, ensuring that product teams deliver data that meets business needs in terms of timeliness, accuracy, and availability.
jd_authorship_reasoning: Mix of specific technical responsibilities (ETL/ELT, data SLAs, CI/CD, observability) with generic leadership boilerplate (collaborate, champion, promote).
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Ensure that agile data product teams deliver fit-for-purpose data models that meet the needs of analytics, AI, and regulatory reporting.
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The role's primary responsibilities focus on building data infrastructure and models consumed by analytics, BI, and data science teams (internal_data audiences), with regulatory reporting as a secondary technical requirement.
autonomy_level_quote: Define and execute the data engineering vision and roadmap aligned with the overall Data, AI & Analytics strategy.
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role's foundational responsibility is to define the vision and roadmap for the data engineering function, indicating strategic ownership of the technical direction and organizational shape.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Establish and continuously improve the operating model for data engineers within agile data product teams
ai_role_quote: Ensure that agile data product teams deliver fit-for-purpose data models that meet the needs of analytics, AI, and regulatory reporting.
ai_role_reasoning: Candidate explicitly builds data models to serve AI systems, indicating infrastructure enablement for AI consumption.
testing_framing_quote: Define and monitor data SLAs and SLOs, ensuring that product teams deliver data that meets business needs in terms of timeliness, accuracy, and availability.
testing_framing_reasoning: Candidate owns definition and monitoring of quality standards (SLAs/SLOs), demonstrating responsibility-level quality ownership.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Promote proactive data reliability engineering, enabling teams to detect and resolve issues early.
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Framing centers on operational reliability and incident prevention (SLOs, early detection) rather than compliance or trust primacy.
